ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-24-2017 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-29-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for (petitioner) Millie Lum. Frank Mahoney, III (Probate Referee) present in Court.

The Court stated that there needs to be a date for close of estate. Mr. Kato reported that there is a dispute between his client and the Probate Referee, that it should be resolved within a couple of weeks but asked if there is a forum for mediation if it is not resolved. The Court stated that it is not aware of one, confirmed that it is a small issue and asked counsel what is the plan if they do not resolve the issue. Mr. Kato stated that there is a rarely used procedure to ask the Court for resolution but was unable to state what it was. The Court granted the Probate Accounting Status Report (subject to review of the order). Status on close of estate is set for April 24, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION

Off Calendar Oct-24-2016 Continued To Nov-07-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-12-2016 Continued To Oct-24-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for Millie Lum.

Mr. Kato stated that all of the beneficiaries have waived accountings and that his client is currently negotiating with the referee regarding the appraisal. The Court stated that at the last hearing Judge Kiesselbach said that this was to be wrapped up by this date. Mr. Kato stated that they are negotiating and that it involves two apartment buildings. The Court stated that if this is not done in 30 days it will need to suspend or remove Ms. Lum. Mr. Kato stated that all beneficiaries are in agreement with how this is proceeding. The status on filing an inventory & appraisal and petition for final distribution was continued to October 24, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Aquino. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-11-2016 Continued To Sep-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for (administrator) Millie Lum.

Mr. Kato requested a 60 day continuance to file an interim status report. The Court stated that there have been lots of delays. Mr. Kato explained that the estate owns 1/2 interest in multiple properties, that there are 5 children who are the heirs, that 1 child manages and lives in one of the properties, that he is reluctant and antagonistic regarding giving the administrator information, that they expect to have it soon, that all of the other properties have been inventoried, that once the final property has been inventoried it is believed that the heirs will waive accountings, that Ms. Lum and the other siblings are reluctant to be aggressive with this sibling, that there are health issues, that they do not want the brunt of his anger and that none of the heirs are complaining. The Court stated that this is a waste of court resources, that it is beyond the time period of the Probate Code, that it will grant one more continuance but that if this Judicial Officer is here next time there will be more drastic measures taken and that Ms. Lum needs to take this seriously. The status on filing an inventory & appraisal; Petition for final distribution or petition for approval on status of administration was continued to September 12, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
